scripts.dev: concurrently --names shared,server,client --prefix-colors cyan,yellow,green "pnpm --filter @bombermp/shared dev" "pnpm --filter @bombermp/server dev" "pnpm --filter @bombermp/client dev"
scripts.build: pnpm --filter @bombermp/shared build && pnpm --filter @bombermp/server build && pnpm --filter @bombermp/client build
scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter @bombermp/shared typecheck && pnpm --filter @bombermp/server typecheck && pnpm --filter @bombermp/client typecheck
